system.description:
Volatile Brewer is the Chemical Specialist discipline for runners who decided the most interesting molecules were the unstable ones. Practitioners specialize in compounds that want to be elsewhere: thrown incendiary gels, contact reagents, vapor-dispersal grenades hand-mixed the morning of the job. They have a healthy respect for their workbench and a great many small scars.

On the job, the Volatile Brewer is the runner whose pockets keep producing new and increasingly aggressive solutions. Their entry feature is Field Mix: at the start of any session they may declare a small batch of thrown ordnance (incendiary, acid, or vapor cloud) and gain a number of charges equal to half their level, used as thrown attacks.
system.grants: Field Mix: declare a thrown ordnance type per session; charges equal to half level.

wizard.tagline: Bring a different bad day in every pocket
